title: Race condition in shared counter increment

code_fault.description: The Counter.increment method performs a non-atomic read-modify-write on self.value without acquiring the lock, causing lost updates under concurrent access. The lock attribute exists but is never used. The benchmark is successful when a candidate patch restores the failing tests.

notes: Hard difficulty. Use with --code-patch patches/local_repo_hard_first_fix.diff to validate the race condition repair path. The lock attribute is intentionally present but unused — the agent must recognize it and apply it correctly around the read-modify-write.
